query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bupa_prerequisites (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  service_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  icd_codes TEXT NOT NULL,
  requirements LONGTEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_service_name (service_name),
  INDEX idx_icd_codes (icd_codes(100))
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bupa_prerequisites (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  service_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  icd_codes TEXT NOT NULL,
  requirements LONGTEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_service_name (service_name),
  INDEX idx_icd_codes (icd_codes(100))
);
